mapper.sql: r.id AS room_id, r.user_id AS user_id, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, r.assigned_admin_id AS assigned_admin_id, au.name AS assigned_admin_name, r.status, r.user_unread_count, r.admin_unread_count, r.last_message_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, ( SELECT content FROM ( SELECT m.content FROM chat_messages m WHERE m.room_id = r.id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS last_message_content, ( SELECT sender_type FROM ( SELECT m.sender_type FROM chat_messages m WHERE m.room_id = r.id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS last_sender_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM chat_rooms r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN users au ON au.id = r.assigned_admin_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM chat_rooms r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN users au ON au.id = r.assigned_admin_id WHERE r.id = #{roomId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM chat_rooms r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN users au ON au.id = r.assigned_admin_id WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.admin_unread_count DESC, NVL(r.last_message_at, r.created_at) DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_id, m.sender_type, u.name AS sender_name, m.content, m.created_at FROM chat_messages m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.sender_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC, m.id ASC
SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_id, m.sender_type, u.name AS sender_name, m.content, m.created_at FROM chat_messages m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.sender_id WHERE m.id = #{messageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms ( user_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO chat_messages ( room_id, sender_id, sender_type, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{senderType}, #{content}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_rooms SET status = 'OPEN', admin_unread_count = admin_unread_count + 1, last_message_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{roomId}

UPDATE chat_rooms SET status = 'OPEN', assigned_admin_id = #{adminId}, user_unread_count = user_unread_count + 1, admin_unread_count = 0, last_message_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{roomId}
UPDATE chat_rooms SET user_unread_count = 0, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{roomId}
UPDATE chat_rooms SET admin_unread_count = 0, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{roomId}
